summary.en: Take real money for a not-yet-built product — Kickstarter, pre-orders, deposits. The strongest desirability + viability signal you can get short of an actual product launch.
summary.zh: 为还没造出来的产品收真钱 —— Kickstarter、预购、定金。在产品真正发布之前,需求性 + 可营性的最强信号。

sources.label: Bland & Osterwalder · Testing Business Ideas · Wiley · 2019 · Validation / 4-23 Pre-Sales
